001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
005import java.util.List;
006import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
007
008/**
009 * Abstraction for accessing and modifying {@link EggGroup} entities.
010 */
011public interface EggGroupRepository {
012
013  /**
014   * Returns all egg groups belonging to a given batch.
015   *
016   * @param batchId batch ID.
017   * @return live list of egg groups for the specified batch.
018   */
019  LiveData<List<EggGroup>> getByBatch(long batchId);
020
021  /**
022   * Returns a single egg group by ID.
023   *
024   * @param id egg-group ID.
025   * @return live egg group with the specified ID.
026   */
027  LiveData<EggGroup> get(long id);
028
029  /**
030   * Inserts or updates an egg group.
031   *
032   * @param eggGroup egg group to save.
033   * @return future completing with the saved egg-group ID.
034   */
035  CompletableFuture<Long> save(EggGroup eggGroup);
036
037  /**
038   * Inserts or updates multiple egg groups.
039   *
040   * @param eggGroups egg groups to save.
041   * @return future completing with the saved IDs in the same order.
042   */
043  CompletableFuture<List<Long>> saveAll(List<EggGroup> eggGroups);
044
045}
